title: glechoma hirsuta
intro: Glechoma hirsuta, also known as hairy mint or Russian mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glechoma hirsuta include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with herbalists often recommending it for its calming and soothing effects.
